title: SLO Gating Decision
description: Governed machine-readable gating decision artifact produced by the Stage-Aware Decision Gating Engine (BN.3). Evaluates a validated SLO enforcement decision in the context of a named pipeline stage and determines whether execution may proceed, must halt, or may proceed only in explicitly permitted warning states.

gating_decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this gating decision.

source_decision_id.description: Identifier of the upstream enforcement decision this gating decision was derived from.

artifact_id.description: Identifier of the artifact that was evaluated.

stage.description: Pipeline stage at which gating was evaluated. '(unknown)' when the stage could not be determined.

enforcement_policy.description: Named enforcement policy profile that produced the source enforcement decision. '(unknown)' when the source decision was malformed.

enforcement_decision_status.description: Decision status from the upstream enforcement decision. '(unknown)' when the source decision was malformed.

gating_outcome.description: Stage-aware gating outcome. proceed = execution may continue; proceed_with_warning = execution continues but operator should monitor; halt = execution must stop.

gating_reason_code.description: Machine-readable code identifying the primary reason for this gating outcome.

traceability_integrity_sli.description: The traceability_integrity SLI value from the enforcement decision. Null when not determinable.

lineage_validation_mode.description: Lineage validation mode from the enforcement decision.

lineage_defaulted.description: True when lineage fields were populated via fail-safe defaults. Null when not determinable.

lineage_valid.description: Whether the artifact lineage was validated without errors. Null when not determinable.

warnings.description: Human-readable warning messages accumulated during gating evaluation.

errors.description: Human-readable error messages accumulated during gating evaluation.

recommended_action.description: Machine-readable recommended action derived from the gating outcome.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this gating decision was generated.
